title: test/vectors/schema.json v2 has invalid JSON and misplaced definitions
description: P0: JSON parse error at EOF (expecting ',' at line 600). P0: definitions object is nested inside properties instead of root level, breaking all . P1: format_version=2 const but all *.json vectors still declare v1 causing validation failure. Does not pass validation for existing vectors. oneOf and complex allOf appear syntactically ok but untestable until fixed. Aligns with test integrity (independent vectors) and dual-impl discipline only if fixed without weakening. See codereview pass 3.
